name: Apricot Bars from Butterfingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the dried apricots, cover with water, and boil for 10 minutes. Cool, drain, and chop finely.
2. Mix butter, sugar, and 1 cup flour until crumbly. Pack into a greased 8-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Sift together 1/3 cup flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Beat the brown sugar gradually into the eggs. Add the sifted ingredients and mix well.
6. Add vanilla, chopped walnuts, and chopped apricots. Spread over the baked layer.
7. Bake for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Cool in the pan, then cut into bars and roll carefully in powdered sugar. These are not only pretty but also luscious and rich.
